goal: One-shot generate map.pgm + map.yaml at 0.05 m/px for Nav2, static obstacles only, origin at scene origin.
thoughts: generate_occupancy_map is the direct path — no SLAM needed. Key: filter out dynamic prims (forklifts with RigidBodyAPI) so they do not bake into the map. Slice height matters: 0.2-0.3 m catches wall bases but misses the under-shelf gap — configurable. Nav2 YAML uses lower-left origin, not center; convention mismatch bakes a 20m offset.
code:
# 1. Identify static vs dynamic — exclude dynamic from map
run_stage_analysis()
# Dynamic prims have PhysicsRigidBodyAPI + non-kinematic flag; exclude them.

# 2. One-shot occupancy generation
generate_occupancy_map(
    stage_path="<WAREHOUSE_USD>",
    resolution_m_per_px=0.05,
    bounds=[[<X_MIN>, <Y_MIN>], [<X_MAX>, <Y_MAX>]],   # ~40x25 m
    slice_z_m=<0.20>,                                   # laser plane height
    exclude_dynamic=True,
    output_format="nav2"                                # PGM + YAML
)

# 3. Export with Nav2 conventions (lower-left origin, free/occupied thresholds)
export_nav2_map(
    output_dir="<MAP_OUTPUT_DIR>",
    map_name="warehouse",
    origin_convention="lower_left",                     # NOT center
    free_thresh=0.196,
    occupied_thresh=0.65
)

# Validate: PGM pixel dims == (x_max-x_min)/res x (y_max-y_min)/res.
failure_modes: Baking dynamic forklifts into the static map
Slice height at 0.0 m — ground plane shows as occupied everywhere
Origin at scene center instead of lower-left — Nav2 plans offset by 20 m
Resolution 0.025 requested but scene is 40 m — memory for 1600x1000 grid huge
